annotations.summary: Sustained Worker CPU-time-exceeded events over the last 15 minutes.
annotations.description: Cloudflare Workers cap at 50ms CPU per invocation (default) / 30s wall-clock. Sustained CPU exceptions mean the sync or dashboard worker is being killed mid-invocation — most often because a Miniflux instance is slow or the sync-time backlog has grown too large. Investigate via `wrangler tail`. TODO: confirm the exact upstream metric name once we can query Grafana Cloud's mimir directly — the plan cites `workers_cpu_time_exceeded_total` but that may need adjustment if Cloudflare's Prometheus scrape uses a different name.
